notes.title: Research Log 001
notes.content: Day 1: Signal towers installed across all sectors. Dr. Reyes says the field should keep the anomaly contained. I hope he's right.

notes.title: Warning Notice
notes.content: SECTOR B RESTRICTED. Do not enter after 2200 hours. The shadows move differently here. Report any visual anomalies to security immediately.

notes.title: Personal Journal
notes.content: It followed me from Lab 3 to the corridor. I turned on every light I could find. It stopped. But when the power flickered... God, it moved so fast.

notes.title: Maintenance Report
notes.content: Signal tower in Sector C is offline. Cause unknown. Attempting manual restart failed. Whatever drained it did so in under 4 minutes.

notes.title: Final Transmission
notes.content: If anyone reads this — the signal is the only thing keeping it back. Don't let it drop to zero. Whatever you do. Don't. Let. It. Drop.

notes.title: Dr. Reyes Notes
notes.content: Subject designation: The Watcher. Thrives in electromagnetic dead zones. Light disrupts its movement. Darkness is its domain. We made a terrible mistake bringing it here.
